cross_scene_arcs.title: Bill's Emergence as Crisis Leader
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bill transitions from a peer in the group to the recognized leader during escalating crises, consistently taking charge when others fail or falter.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bill asserts factual authority in a group setting
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bill coordinates armed defense under extreme pressure

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bill and Starla's Unresolved Romantic Tension
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bill's emotional connection with Starla resurfaces and deepens through shared danger, but remains unfulfilled due to past inaction and her ultimate betrayal.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bill seeks a quiet moment with Starla, hinting at lingering feelings
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Starla kills Bill while expressing emotional conflict and fatalism
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether their relationship could have overcome personal and external forces

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bill's Investigation into the Parasite Threat
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bill shifts from routine policing to leading an investigation into a supernatural threat, identifying patterns, gathering intelligence, and directing operations to stop the entity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bill begins investigating Grant's connection to a missing person
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bill leads a mission to extract allies after confronting the central threat
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the entity's full capabilities and how to permanently stop it

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bill's Role as Protector in Survival Situations
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bill repeatedly places himself in danger to protect others, especially Starla, using both physical action and strategic decisions to ensure survival.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bill shields Starla from parasitic invasion in the barn
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bill enables Starla and Trevor's escape from a lethal confrontation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: his protection ultimately fails to save himself

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Control and Abuse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Grant's relationship with Starla deteriorates from protective dominance to emotional and sexual coercion, revealing a pattern of control and disregard for her autonomy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: asserts himself as Starla's protector, distrustful of outsiders
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: objectifies Starla, referring to her as 'meat' while maintaining psychological control
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Starla's compliance masks fear or silent resistance, leaving her true feelings and potential for defiance unclear

cross_scene_arcs.title: Biological Transformation and Loss of Humanity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Grant undergoes progressive physical and neurological changes after spore infection, culminating in full mutation and post-mortem biological activity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: infected by alien spore that integrates into his brain
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: fully mutated into a non-human entity, with biological threat persisting after death
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the spore emerging from his remains suggests potential for continued propagation

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Educator to Threat
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Grant shifts from a position of intellectual authority to a source of physical and existential danger, reflecting a collapse of human identity and social role.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: respected high school biology teacher promoting scientific inquiry
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: violent antagonist using parasitic abilities to subdue others
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: his initial role as an educator contrasts with his later actions, but no reflection on this irony occurs

cross_scene_arcs.title: Violent Escalation and Confrontation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Grant's interactions become increasingly aggressive, moving from emotional abuse to physical assault and parasitic violation of others.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: responds to sexual rejection with anger and hostility
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: attacks Starla with lethal intent and is recognized as a public threat
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: his violent outbursts are tied to perceived betrayal, but the extent of his capacity for restraint is unknown

cross_scene_arcs.title: Ambiguous Emotional Connection to Starla
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Despite dehumanization and transformation, Grant exhibits moments of emotional focus on Starla, interpreting her actions as loyalty even in grotesque circumstances.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: covertly observes Starla with fascination after achieving human mimicry
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: responds with emotional hesitation to Starla's feigned offering of Bill
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: it is unclear whether his responses reflect residual love, programmed behavior, or misinterpretation of manipulation
